abstract.text: Get miscellaneous runtime configuration.
Get a list of suggestions (feeds and users) tagged with categories
Get a skeleton of suggested starterpacks. Intended to be called and hydrated by app.bsky.unspecced.getSuggestedStarterpacks
Get the current trends on the network
Backend Starter Pack search, returns only skeleton.
(NOTE: this endpoint is under development and WILL change without notice. Don’t use it until it is moved out of

or your application WILL break) Get additional posts under a thread e.g. replies hidden by threadgate. Based on an anchor post at any depth of the tree, returns top-level replies below that anchor. It does not include ancestors nor the anchor itself. This should be called after exhausting
. Does not require auth, but additional metadata and filtering will be applied for authed requests.
Get the skeleton of trends on the network. Intended to be called and then hydrated through app.bsky.unspecced.getTrends
Get a list of suggested feeds
Get a list of trending topics
A comprehensive Swift library for the AT Protocol and Bluesky social network.
Get a skeleton of suggested users for the Explore page. Intended to be called and hydrated by app.bsky.unspecced.getSuggestedUsersForExplore
Get a skeleton of suggested users for the Discover page. Intended to be called and hydrated by app.bsky.unspecced.getSuggestedUsersForDiscover
Get a skeleton of suggested users for onboarding. Intended to be called and hydrated by app.bsky.unspecced.getSuggestedOnboardingUsers
Get a list of suggested users for the Discover page
Get a skeleton of suggested feeds. Intended to be called and hydrated by app.bsky.unspecced.getSuggestedFeeds
Get a skeleton of suggested users for the See More page. Intended to be called and hydrated by app.bsky.unspecced.getSuggestedUsersForSeeMore
Get a list of suggested starterpacks for onboarding
(NOTE: this endpoint is under development and WILL change without notice. Don’t use it until it is moved out of

or your application WILL break) Get posts in a thread. It is based in an anchor post at any depth of the tree, and returns posts above it (recursively resolving the parent, without further branching to their replies) and below it (recursive replies, with branching to their replies). Does not require auth, but additional metadata and filtering will be applied for authed requests.
An unspecced view of globally popular feed generators.

The main client for interacting with the AT Protocol.

Get a skeleton of suggested users. Intended to be called and hydrated by app.bsky.unspecced.getSuggestedUsers
Returns the current state of the age assurance process for an account. This is used to check if the user has completed age assurance or if further action is required.
